posts.author: caiomb (Caio Minniti Biolchini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
First, sorry about my broken English, it is not my first language.

I’m having problems moving some itens from a board to another.
This is the one way of moving itens from a board to another:

image2215×555 70.5 KB

When i choose the board i want to move to, these are the options that this tool gives me:

image1990×944 84 KB

Note how i can populate the mirror columns and connect board columns.
This works fine for me because the column “Manutenção” goes into “Nº do Pedido”.

I tried using an automation to minimize my clicks but i cant because the screen doesnt allow me to allocate the “Manutenção” column to the “Nº de Pedidos” column. image:

image1952×967 47.3 KB

Am i missing something? I cant find a solution for this.
